title: SPP LMP Real Time WEIS CSV download
description:
Real-time five-minute LMP data for the WEIS real-time balancing market by settlement location.  

💡 WEIS is a real-time only balancing market administered by SPP in the Western Interconnect.

 📝 This dataset was utilized in *[SPP Expansion Provides a Blueprint for the Future of the Grid](https://blog.gridstatus.io/spp-expansion-west/)*

For more information: https://portal.spp.org/groups/weis
